prompt: Create a cinematic semi-realistic digital painting of a solitary young woman in a weathered hooded cloak, shown in close-up three-quarter profile from the shoulders up. She has dark black loose, wind-tangled hair spilling from beneath the hood, pale olive skin, strong dark eyebrows, a delicate nose, slightly parted lips, and striking clear blue-gray eyes looking off to the right with a quiet, determined expression. The cloak is charcoal brown, rough, dusty, frayed along the hood edge, with painterly folds wrapping around her shoulders; her muted worn tunic is barely visible underneath. Set her against a soft dawn desert sky with warm peach light near the horizon and cool gray clouds above, using strong backlighting and rim light around the hood and hair. Style: high-detail fantasy concept art, realistic anime-inspired face, dramatic atmospheric lighting, visible brush texture, moody post-apocalyptic traveler aesthetic, shallow depth of field, vertical portrait crop, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptEn: Create a cinematic semi-realistic digital painting of a solitary young woman in a weathered hooded cloak, shown in close-up three-quarter profile from the shoulders up. She has dark black loose, wind-tangled hair spilling from beneath the hood, pale olive skin, strong dark eyebrows, a delicate nose, slightly parted lips, and striking clear blue-gray eyes looking off to the right with a quiet, determined expression. The cloak is charcoal brown, rough, dusty, frayed along the hood edge, with painterly folds wrapping around her shoulders; her muted worn tunic is barely visible underneath. Set her against a soft dawn desert sky with warm peach light near the horizon and cool gray clouds above, using strong backlighting and rim light around the hood and hair. Style: high-detail fantasy concept art, realistic anime-inspired face, dramatic atmospheric lighting, visible brush texture, moody post-apocalyptic traveler aesthetic, shallow depth of field, vertical portrait crop, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
promptZh: 创作一幅电影感半写实数字绘画，描绘一位身穿破旧兜帽斗篷的孤身少女，画面为肩部以上的四分之三侧面特写。她拥有 深黑色 凌乱且被风吹散的头发从兜帽下垂落，浅橄榄色皮肤，浓密的深色眉毛，精致的鼻子，微张的双唇，以及迷人的 清澈的蓝灰色 双眼，正看向右侧，表情安静而坚定。斗篷为 炭褐色，质地粗糙、布满尘土，兜帽边缘磨损，带有包裹肩部的绘画感褶皱；内搭的褪色旧长袍隐约可见。背景设定为柔和的 黎明沙漠天空，地平线附近有温暖的桃色光芒，上方则是冷灰色的云层，运用强烈的逆光和勾勒兜帽与头发的轮廓光。风格：高细节奇幻概念艺术，写实动漫风格面部，戏剧性氛围光，可见笔触，忧郁的末日旅行者美学，浅景深，竖构图肖像，无文字，无水印，无额外角色。
